title: Enhancing efficiency and quality control: The impact of Digital Twins in drinking water networks
reviewer_note: Digital twin prototypes were implemented on an Azure/Dinapsis operational platform with operator alarms and decision support; full-scale advisory evidence.

title: Design and development of reverse osmosis (RO) plant status monitoring system for early fault prediction and predictive maintenance
reviewer_note: RO status monitoring system was installed in village RO plants for real-time monitoring, early fault prediction and predictive maintenance; pilot/advisory.

title: Machine learning based soft sensor model for BOD estimation using intelligence at edge
reviewer_note: Edge BOD soft-sensor setup was deployed at an STP outlet and evaluated with 100 real-time BOD readings; advisory monitoring.

title: An insight into real-time monitoring and predictive modelling of ultrafiltration pretreatment for flow rate and fouling mitigation in seawater desalination
reviewer_note: Real-plant real-time framework adjusted backwash, TMP and flow decisions for UF pretreatment; deployment evidence supports control use.

title: Intelligent framework for coagulant dosing optimization in an industrial-scale seawater reverse osmosis desalination plant
reviewer_note: No local full text available; evidence only identifies a candidate industrial-scale dosing optimization study, not confirmed plant deployment.

title: Optimization of denitrification carbon source, nitrification aeration and coagulants dosing with artificial intelligence in full-scale municipal wastewater treatment
reviewer_note: No local full text available; plant deployment or real-time control could not be verified from available evidence.

title: Predicting Membrane Fouling of Submerged Membrane Bioreactor Wastewater Treatment Plants Using Machine Learning
reviewer_note: MBR-Net web interface was integrated with a WWTP IoT platform for real-time fouling prediction and operator decision support; advisory.

title: Machine Learning-Assisted Expert Control in Wastewater Aeration Treatment Process Application
reviewer_note: Full-scale WWTP aeration control was validated on SCADA data with no-manual-intervention periods over 58 days and six-month operation; closed-loop.

title: Enhancing Coagulation Prediction in Water Treatment Using a Similarity Score–Based Piecewise Machine Learning Model
reviewer_note: No local full text; ASCE evidence unavailable, so the LLM deployment label was not verified.

title: Outlier Detection and Correction for Monitoring Data of Water Quality Based on Improved VMD and LSSVM
reviewer_note: Software platform was applied to Zhejiang water-quality monitoring stations for monitoring-data outlier detection and correction; advisory monitoring.

title: Machine Learning-Based Prediction of Biogas Production from Sludge Characteristics in Four Anaerobic Digesters: Development of the AD2Biogas Prediction Tool
reviewer_note: AD2Biogas Predictor Tool was implemented at the studied WWTP for biogas prediction from sludge characteristics; advisory.

title: Design and application of soft sensors in rural sewage treatment facilities
reviewer_note: Soft sensors were applied at three Changzhou rural sewage treatment facilities for real-time monitoring; advisory.

title: Performance improvement of wastewater treatment processes by application of machine learning
reviewer_note: No local full text; available evidence does not verify an implemented online or real-time plant system.

title: DATA-CENTERED DEVELOPMENT AND PREDICTIVE EVALUATION OF A SUPERVISED MACHINE LEARNING SYSTEM FOR WATER QUALITY ANOMALY DETECTION IN A LAGUNA WATER DISTRICT
reviewer_note: No local full text; deployment or operational use cannot be confirmed beyond candidate title/metadata.

title: Development and Optimization of an Automated Industrial Wastewater Treatment System Using PLC and LSTM Neural Network
reviewer_note: Industrial PLC automation system was used for wastewater treatment; LSTM forecasts supported reagent and aeration optimization, not direct ML actuation.

title: Prediction, Uncertainty Quantification, and ANN-Assisted Operation of Anaerobic Digestion Guided by Entropy Using Machine Learning
reviewer_note: ANN predictions and uncertainty were displayed in SCADA; operator adjusted AD cycle from 30 to 90 min, with no direct actuation; advisory.

title: Agent Addition to Coal Slurry Water Using Data-Driven Intelligent Control
reviewer_note: iFix plus PLC intelligent control automatically adjusted the dosing pump and was applied in the Ningxia plant since Dec 2023; closed-loop.
